title: Over - Under Spiel
content:
# Over - Under Spiel

### The 2025 Over/Under was September 19th -21st

The information below pertains to the 2025 event. See you next year!

The goal of the Over - Under Spiel is to encourage people who are newer to curling to **bonspiel, but in a setting where they face teams with similar levels of** **experience.** Each team **must** contain at least two members with five years or fewer of curling experience each, and **can** have up to two members **over five years of experience each**.

Whether this will be your first bonspiel, you want to gain experience with your 5 & under team, or you want to encourage some members of your club to travel to their first event, we hope you'll give this social, relaxed, but still competitive bonspiel a shot!

* 24 teams with event running from Friday morning through Sunday afternoon
* 3-game guarantee
* Cost: $480 per team entry
* First draw: **no earlier than** 8:00AM on Friday
* Last draw: **no later than** 1:30PM on Sunday
* Lunch and Dinner (Friday lunch through Sunday lunch) included
* Breakfast at host hotel
* Draw snacks, desserts, and other snacks available throughout the event
* [All draws will be live streamed to YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/user/TriangleCurling)

Any team with 3 or more Triangle Curling Club members is considered a Triangle team, not an out-of-town team. If this applies to you, do not register on the website, but instead follow the instructions below.

Instructions for Triangle teams:

* Send your full team roster with positions listed (or in order with proposed skip at the top) to [[contact email]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#137c657661667d7776615367617a727d747f767066617f7a7d743d707c7e3d)
* Deadline is August 8th, 2025
* Depending on registrations from non-Triangle teams, a minimum of 3 Triangle Curling Club teams will be selected via a random lottery

### Location

Triangle Curling Club - 2310 So Hi Drive, Durham, NC 27703

### Payment and Cancellation Policy

Payment is required upon registration. 

Cancellations before September 1st will receive a full refund. Beginning September 2nd, you will receive a full refund only if we are able to find a replacement team. Cancellations after September 14th will receive no refund.

### Hotel

Courtyard Raleigh-Durham Airport/Brier Creek for $134 USD per night  
[Booking link](https://www.marriott.com/event-reservations/reservation-link.mi?id=1751377399503&key=GRP&app=resvlink) \-- Last Day to Book: Tuesday, August 19, 2025

If you would like to book a room for dates outside of the designated hotel block dates please call the hotel directly and mention Triangle Curling Club block when booking.

### Questions? Contact us at: [contact email][](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#fc938a998e899298998ebc888e959d929b90999f898e9095929bd29f9391)

### FAQ

Q: What if I have 3 "unders"? What about 4?  
 A: That's fine! No more than 2 "overs" per team.

Q: What if we have an alternate**?** 
A: As long as the fielded team complies with the rules, you're fine.

Q: What if I have a team of three? Can we have 2 "overs" and 1 "under"?  
 A: No. Your team must have at least 2 "unders".

Q: My "under" had to back out at the last minute. Can I sub an "over" in their place?  
 A: Only so long as the team that is actually fielded complies with the team composition rules. **This means, you can sub an “over” in, but you still need to have a minimum of 2 “unders.”**

Q: Can I form at team with Niklas Edin, Oskar Eriksson, and two 5th-year curlers?  
 A: You're kinda missing the spirit of the event, but yes, bring it on ;)

Q: I like rules. Can you formally state the team composition rule?  
 A: At any point during any game, there must be at least 2 players on each team with 5 or fewer years of curling experience. Any game played with a team in violation of this rule will be forfeited by the offending team. The number of years of experience is calculated in the same manner as the GNCC 5-and-under events, which is explained by Rule 7 in the [GNCC 5yr and Under Rules](https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vSRWooV3aW5NxX%5FyzH8GTFkilQXKkF-wo3sM5I61IUOao0kEWdA9bkxqubObc09U92vIf9Bnx%5FlUYOy/pub). Furthermore, a curler who has played in five Over-Under Bonspiels is automatically considered to be an "over" in future Over-Under Bonspiels. Triangle Curling reserves the right to investigate eligibility from any participant's home club.

---
